characters.name: Amy Andou
characters.description: Amy AndouFirst AppearanceJealous Hamtaro & Other Stories(1999, manga)ProfileSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleOwner ofHamtaro(Jealous Hamtarodescendant)LovesTimothy SuzukiDate of BirthFebrurary 28Amy Andou(Ai Andou,Ai-Chan) is a 4th grader and the owner of theHamtaroinJealous Hamtaro & Other Stories. She first met Hamtaro when her dog Scruffy found him sick and wet in the rain. She brought him in and nursed him back to health and he has been close to her ever since. She likes Timothy and Hamtaro is jealous. She loves Hamtaro but only as a pet. She even introduces him to a female hamster named Blossom who turns him down. Amy feels bad for Hamtaro. She also disciplines Hamtaro when he bites Timothy. She likes to spend time with Timothy like studying with him and lighting fireworks with him. She is a kind little girl. She is also shown to be emotional when she does not wish to see Timothy after Kaya asks her to deliver a love letter, is upset that Timothy lost one of the gloves she gave him, and is angry and devastated when she thinks Timothy abused Hamtaro. characters.name: Anna
characters.description: AnnaAnna with Hamtaro in Picture Book DechuFirst AppearanceHamutaro's Tottoko Picture Book Dechu(2001, manga)Tottoko Hamutaro: Tomodachi Daisakusen Dechu - Nintendo Official Guidebook(2000)ProfileSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleOwner ofHamtaro(Picture Book Dechudescendant)FamilyUnnamed fatherAnna(あんなちゃん) is the owner ofHamtaroinHamutaro's Tottoko Picture Book Dechu(andits sequel). She is also shown in the strategy guide book forTottoko Hamutaro: Tomodachi Daisakusen Dechu. She is very similar in design toLaura Haruna, though appears to be a little younger. She is rather fashionable, wearing many different outfits throughout her stories. Tottoko Hamutaro: Tomodachi Daisakusen Dechu - Nintendo Official Guidebook(2000) Anna's cameo in the anime

characters.name: Arnie
characters.description: Arnie is fromHamtaro: Ham Ham Heartbreak. He lost his potty training seat, and his big brother was searching for it. Arnie looks a bit likeOxnardfrom behind. Later on in the game, as you walk into a cave, he switches places withBijou. When you try to interact with him, he starts to cry. You first need to calm him down before you follow him through the cave to take him back to his house.

Vol.1(1999, manga)ProfileSpeciesHumanGenderMaleFamilyJi-chan(grandfather)Unnamed mother, father, and baby brotherBest FriendHamtaro,Akari-chanAtsu-kun(あつくん) is a character from theTottoko Hamutaro: Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu!manga series. He is friends withHamtaroand the other Ham-Hams (who are owned byhis grandfather).

characters.name: Auntie Viv
characters.description: Auntie VivFirst AppearanceEpisode 28:The Amazing Auntie Viv(2001, anime)Hamtaro: Ham-Hams Unite!(2001, video game)Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderFemaleOwnerNoneLovesElder HamVoice ActorEnglishPam HyattJapanMasako NozawaItalyGraziella PortaAuntie Viv(おハムばあさん) is an unusually fit elderly hamster with an attitude. Despite her age, she is incredibly athletic and energetic, moreso than even the toughest of the other Ham-Hams. Hamtaro: Ham-Hams Unite!(2001, video game)Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga) Auntie Viv is an elderly, yet surprisingly robust, hamster. Even though she's very old, she is incredibly skilled at athletics; she loves doing activities like snowboarding, skateboarding, and running marathons. She can sometimes act wild and be rude, especially towardsElder Ham; but in most cases she is kind, and will sometimes give the Ham-Hams free advice. Auntie Viv is an elderly, yet surprisingly robust, hamster. She can sometimes act wild and be rude, especially towardsElder Ham; but in most cases she is kind, and will sometimes give the Ham-Hams free advice.

characters.name: Ayayamu
characters.description: AyayamuFirst AppearanceHamtaro: Fairy Tale(2004, anime)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderFemaleEye ColourModerate AzureVoice ActorJapanAya MatsuuraAyayamu(あややム) is a hamster who appears in in the fourthHamtaromovie,Hamtaro: Fairy Tale. She is voiced by, and is loosely based on the likeness of, singer and Morning Musume memberAya Matsuura. Ayayamu lives in a giant, secluded library, and is the author of many books. She was writing the classic story of "Sunflower Taro" and had to finish it before 8:06, so she enlisted the Ham-Hams to help her act out the story. In her earlier school years, Ayayamu was somewhat of a child prodigy; she was particularly skilled at drawing and writing. However, she was overly braggy about her talents, makingher schoolmatesbecome spiteful towards her. After catching her friends mocking her for her boastful attitude, Ayayamu decided to forever close herself inside the library and stopped believing in friendship. She remained completely alone in the library - save for the aid of her assistants,Shige HamandRika Ham- never once returning to the outside world. Ayayamu lives in a giant, secluded library, and is the author of many books. She was writing the classic story of "Sunflower Taro" and had to finish it before 8:06, so she enlisted the Ham-Hams to help her act out the story. In her earlier school years, Ayayamu was somewhat of a child prodigy; she was particularly skilled at drawing and writing. However, she was overly braggy about her talents, makingher schoolmatesbecome spiteful towards her. After catching her friends mocking her for her boastful attitude, Ayayamu decided to forever close herself inside the library and stopped believing in friendship. She remained completely alone in the library - save for the aid of her assistants,Shige HamandRika Ham- never once returning to the outside world. At the end of the movie,Hamtarohelped her to come out of her shell, and re-believe in the power of friendship.

characters.name: Ayayamu's schoolmates
characters.description: Ayayamu's schoolmatesare a group of nine hamsters who attended the same academy asAyayamu. Though they appeared to be close with Ayayamu at first, celebrating Ayayamu's birthday with her, Ayayayamu eventually caught them mocking her behind her back. The betrayal left a deep scar on Ayayamu's heart, resulting in her shutting herself away in the Library tower and lost all her belief in friendship.

characters.name: Baby-Hams
characters.description: Baby-HamsFirst AppearanceHamtaro: Rainbow Rescue(2003, video game)Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderUnknown genderOwnerNoneTheBaby-Hamsare a group of four little hamsters, children ofMama-HamandPapa-Ham, who appear inHamtaro: Rainbow Rescue, and cameo in some otherHamtaromedia. Due to their young age, they can only say "Eeee?". Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga) InHamtaro: Rainbow Rescue, three of the Baby-Hams run away, and have to be retrieved and returned to Mama-Ham (who is in a state of complete panic). The fourth Baby-Ham, according to Papa-Ham, was dropped off at the nursery.

characters.name: Barrette
characters.description: BarretteFirst AppearanceEpisode 133:Knitting, Knitting Barrette!(2003, anime)Hamtaro: Ham-Ham Heartbreak(2002, video game)Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderFemaleOwnerKaoruBest FriendPashminaandPenelopeLovesSeamore,Hamtaro(#133)Date of BirthSeptember 9thEye ColourBlueVoice ActorJapanChiemi ChibaItalySerena ClericiBarrette(ポニーテールちゃん) is a hamster who appears inHamtaro: Ham-Ham Heartbreakand some of the Japanese episodes. She is a playful young girl who loves to knit. Hamtaro: Ham-Ham Heartbreak(2002, video game)Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga) Barrette is a knitting girl; her hobby for knitting is shared by her owner,Kaoru. She is a little smaller than most of the Ham-Hams, and is seemingly a bit younger. She always keeps a giant ball of yarn with her; often times, she even rides on top of it like a balancing act. Barrette is a knitting girl; her hobby for knitting is shared by her owner,Kaoru. She is a little smaller than most of the Ham-Hams, and is seemingly a bit younger. She always keeps a giant ball of yarn with her; often times, she even rides on top of it like a balancing act. InHamtaro: Ham-Ham Heartbreak, Barrette runs the Photo Studio in theHam-Ham Clubhousewith her boyfriend,Seamore. Despite this, when she first appeared in the anime series, she had a crush onHamtaro- and did not get a crush on Seamore in the anime untilThe Knitting Girl and Seamore(#186).

characters.name: Bear
characters.description: BearFirst AppearanceEpisode 202:It's Art, Otome's Crew!(2004, anime)Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderMaleOwnerNoneBest FriendLionandOtomeEye ColourBrownVoice ActorJapanHiroko OyamadaBear(くまくん) is a hamster who appears in some of the Japanese episodes. He is friends withOtomeandLionand is part of Otome's Crew. They all love art and are constantly saying "Go, go, art, go!". Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga) Despite being a member of Otome's rambunctious crew, Bear is quite sensitive and gentle. He is a bit clumsy as well due to his large stature, and this sometimes hinders the crew's acrobatic routines. He is rather quiet, and doesn't speak much - especially when compared to the always-blathering Otome and Lion. Despite being a member of Otome's rambunctious crew, Bear is quite sensitive and gentle. He is a bit clumsy as well due to his large stature, and this sometimes hinders the crew's acrobatic routines. He is rather quiet, and doesn't speak much - especially when compared to the always-blathering Otome and Lion. He typically ends his sentences with the word "kuma~".

characters.personality_section: Despite being a member of Otome's rambunctious crew, Bear is quite sensitive and gentle. He is a bit clumsy as well due to his large stature, and this sometimes hinders the crew's acrobatic routines. He is rather quiet, and doesn't speak much - especially when compared to the always-blathering Otome and Lion. He typically ends his sentences with the word "kuma~".

characters.name: Bijou
characters.description: BijouStandard1999 designFirst AppearanceEpisode 1:Hamtaro(2000, anime [TV series])Tottoko Hamutaro Anime Dechu!(1999, anime [special])Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.1(1999, manga)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderFemaleOwnerMariaBest FriendPashmina,Penelope,Sandy,Sparkle,OshareLovesHamtaroDate of BirthJuly 10thEye ColourTealHeight7.5cmVoice ActorEnglishChantal StrandJapanKazusa MuraiItalyGiovanna PapandreaBijou(リボンちゃん) is a female hamster with white fur and two blue ribbons. She is an elegant and somewhat unworldly hamster; but she is not above getting dirty when she needs to help her friends, always acting very generous and helpful. Tottoko Hamutaro Anime Dechu!(1999, anime [special])Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.1(1999, manga) Bijou is owned byMaria; the two of them moved to Hamtaro's neighborhood fromFrance. She is tidy and graceful, but that doesn't stop her from helping out the Ham-Hams when needed. She prizes her blue ribbons - which she always wears, holding her pigtails in place. Bijou is owned byMaria; the two of them moved to Hamtaro's neighborhood fromFrance. She is tidy and graceful, but that doesn't stop her from helping out the Ham-Hams when needed. She prizes her blue ribbons - which she always wears, holding her pigtails in place. Throughout the entire series, Bijou has a massive crush onHamtaro. Meanwhile,Bosshas a huge crush on Bijou; but she is not aware of this, and seems to view him more as a big brother figure. Bijou is close friends with the other girl Ham-Hams (Pashmina,Penelope,Sandy, etc.) - and they know about Bijou's crush on Hamtaro. In some earlier media (such asHamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.1), Bijou was shown to have an interest in knitting. She would knit fluffy sweaters for Hamtaro and friends; though they would often take more interest in the balls of yarn she wasusingto knit. This was not established in the anime series, and the "knitting girl" role would later be given toBarrette. In the Japanese version, Bijou speaks normal Japanese and adds the words "dechuwa" (most likely a hamster version of "desu wa") at the end of her sentences. In the English version, Bijou has a thin French accent, and speaks with a sort of "squeaky" voice.Osharealso adds "dechuwa" at the end her sentences, perhaps because they both hail from France.

characters.name: Bo Bunch
characters.description: TheBo Bunch's artwork inHamtaro: Ham-Ham Games. Bo Bunch(てるちゃんず) are the loyal and cute servants ofPrince Bothat appear in theHamtaro: Ham-Ham Gamesvideo game. These little guys work very hard to make sure the Ham-Ham Games are ready for the contestants. After an event, they fly around having fun and working on chores.

characters.name: Boberry
characters.description: Boberry(あおてるちゃん,Aoteru-chan) is the 5thBo Bunchmember. He is a short filled tummy and really wants to eat. He is humorous because he said 3 afterBolimeand said 8 afterBogrape. His signature color is blue of a blueberry. His teammates areBomegranate,Borange,Bopaya,Bolime,Bogrape, andBoplum.

characters.name: Boberry

His signature color is blue of a blueberry. His teammates areBomegranate,Borange,Bopaya,Bolime,Bogrape, andBoplum.

characters.name: Bog
characters.description: BogFirst AppearanceHamtaro: Ham-Ham Heartbreak(2002)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderMaleOwnerN/ABest FriendMonkeyBogis a hamster who appears inHamtaro: Ham-Ham Heartbreakin Wildwoods. WhenHamtaroandBijoufirst meet Bog, he traps Hamtaro in a cage thinking he is a bad hamster likethe one he encountered earlier. Upon realizing his mistake, he frees Hamtaro. Throughout the player's time in Wildwoods, Bog will teach Hamtaro and Bijou Hamchat and help them out when they're in trouble. In a later side quest, Bog is looking for a "hot spring egg". Once Hamtaro finds this egg, he can give it to Bog and it will hatch, revealing a little duck. In addition to the duck, Bog lives with a talking monkey (simply known as "Monkey") that the player meets earlier in the game.

characters.name: Bogrape
characters.description: Bogrape(あいてるちゃん) is the 6thBo Bunchmember. She is competitive because she wants a cleaning tournament. She is also humorous because she said 4 afterBoberry, and said 8 afterBoplum. Her signature color is indigo/dark blue. Her teammates areBomegranate,Borange,Bopaya,Bolime,Boberry, andBoplum.

She is also humorous because she said 2 afterBopaya, and said 9 afterBoberry. Her signature color is green of a lime. Her teammates areBomegranate,Borange,Bopaya,Boberry,Bogrape, andBoplum.

characters.description: Bomegranate(あかてるちゃん,Akateru-chan) is the leader of theBo Bunch. His signature color is red and the color pomegranate seeds. His teammates isBorange,Bopaya,Bolime,Boberry,Bogrape, andBoplum.

characters.name: Bomegranate
characters.description: Bomegranate(あかてるちゃん,Akateru-chan) is the leader of theBo Bunch. His signature color is red and the color pomegranate seeds. His teammates isBorange,Bopaya,Bolime,Boberry,Bogrape, andBoplum.

characters.name: Bopaya
characters.description: Bopaya(きてるちゃん,Kiteru-chan) is the 3rdBo Bunchmember. He has an awesome feel to himself and likes the word yeah, untilPenelopetraded her word Ookwee in the Ham Ham Games. He is funny as well because he said 10 afterBolime, and said 1 afterBorange. His signature color is yellow from a color of a papaya. His teammates areBomegranate,Borange,Bolime,Boberry,Bogrape, andBoplum.

characters.name: Boplum
characters.description: Boplum(むらさきてるちゃん,Murasakiteru-chan) is the finalBo Bunchmember. He is very serious and hard working. He was accidentally mistaken for saying 5 and didn't say any number above 6. His signature color is purple the color of plums. His teammates areBomegranate,Borange,Bopaya,Bolime,Boberry, andBogrape.

Her signature color is orange from a color of an orange. Her teammates areBomegranate,Bopaya,Bolime,Boberry,Bogrape, andBoplum.

characters.name: Boss
characters.description: BossFirst AppearanceEpisode 1:Hamtaro(2000, anime)Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga)ProfileSpeciesHamsterGenderMaleOwnerNoneBest FriendHamtaro,Oxnard,SnoozerLovesBijou,Oshare,GelatoDate of BirthSeptember 21stEye ColourMoss GreenHeight12 cmVoice ActorEnglishTed ColeJapanKentaro ItoItalyClaudio MonetaBoss(タイショーくんTaishō-kun ) is a field hamster. The self-proclaimed leader of the Ham-Hams, he often tries to make it look like he knows everything, usually to have it backfire on him completely. Hamuchanzu de Gozaimachu! Vol.2(2001, manga) Gruff on the outside, but lovable on the inside, this bachelor field hamster likes being in charge. His name, Boss, may reflect what he wants to be, but he'd give his own helmet and shovel to a Ham-Ham in need. He has a bit of a temper, but he is very dependable, courageous, and even shy at times (especially aroundBijou). His favorite phrase in the Japanese version is "Daji~e!" or "Dabba-to!". Gruff on the outside, but lovable on the inside, this bachelor field hamster likes being in charge. His name, Boss, may reflect what he wants to be, but he'd give his own helmet and shovel to a Ham-Ham in need. He has a bit of a temper, but he is very dependable, courageous, and even shy at times (especially aroundBijou). His favorite phrase in the Japanese version is "Daji~e!" or "Dabba-to!". Because he is a field hamster, he is more familiar with nature and is more independent compared to the other Ham-Hams. He has even developed a field hamster sense that instinctively tells him what kind of weather is approaching. However, he cannot deal with the sea as he is prone to seasickness. He lives alone in his house, which quickly becomes theHam-Ham Clubhouse. Boss has a huge crush on Bijou; but Bijou never felt the same way, being in love withHamtaroinstead. Near the end ofHamtaro: Ham-Ham Heartbreak, it is also hinted that he has a small crush onHarmony. Boss later in the series has shown affection for other girl-hams, such asOshareandGelato(the latter of which returned his feelings). Starting fromI'm Parting, Clubhouse!(#193), Boss leaves to go on a long journey, and is absent for a long streak of episodes. The Ham-Ham Clubhouse is concealed until Boss's return, and the remaining Ham-Hams go on to discoverSweet Paradiseand meetLapisandLazuli, marking the new season. InDabatto! Hero-Ham, he takes on a "Hero-Ham" persona, in which he assists the Ham-Hams (and others in need), who aren't aware it is really Boss. This act lasts untilHere I Am, Clubhouse!, when Hamtaro finally realizes that Hero-Ham is really Boss. Afterward, Boss returns to the now-abandoned clubhouse. He occasionally returns to his Hero-Ham outfit in later episodes to help others; and is typically in this form aroundOtome's Crew, who still are unaware who Hero-Ham really is.
